info.title: ZqOmni Physical AI Data & Compute Infrastructure Platform

post.description: Anonymous. Always 202 with an identical body (anti-enumeration).
M01-2: verify email+code, create session (dual-token response).

Silent-refresh endpoint (ARCHITECTURE §2.6): exchanges the long-lived
opaque session token (httpOnly cookie) for a fresh short-lived access JWT.
Applies the M01-7 introspection rules: status + both expiries, sliding idle.

get.description: M01-3: user, tenants, roles, effective permission summary.

put.description: M01-4: validate tenant active + user assigned, re-anchor context.

post.description:
Registers an inventory descriptor of externally provisioned equipment;
provisions nothing (DA-20).

M03-1: PA pre-registers a corporate email — the M01 login prerequisite.
No invitation email is sent (scope discipline).

M03-2: deactivate + session-revocation cascade. Bindings stay but are
inert (denied at M03-10 step 2), so reactivation restores access intact.

get.description: Built-ins (read-only) + customs visible at the tenant scope.
Self always allowed; others require iam.role_binding:read at the scope.

BindingPublicOut.title: BindingPublicOut
BindingPublicOut.description:
Sanitized binding view for TA/RD (M02-7): kind, name, mode, capacity
view, status, health — no credentials, vault paths, or raw endpoints.

message.title: Message
message.default: If the email is registered, a login code has been sent.

ResourceDescriptor.title: ResourceDescriptor
ResourceDescriptor.description: Exactly one branch present, matching class x form (M02-3).
